narrative:
DRIVER
GBP leads H4 CSM at 100 with NZD at 99, both flagged as critical divergence signals against their D1 readings of 0 and 40 respectively, while AUD D1 CSM of 100 fades to H4 57 making AUDJPY the cleaner D1 expression with a Strong Buy D1 plus H4 Buy and 1212 H4 momentum at 76 rising. GBPUSD and GBPJPY are the primary H4 vehicles given GBPUSD correlation to GBPJPY at 0.89 and NZDUSD at 0.83 amplifying any GBP extension, while AUDJPY remains the highest-conviction D1 carry trade with AUDUSD correlation at 0.86 confirming.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: AUDUSD CMP 60 D1 66 H4 56 both rising, AUDJPY CMP 60 H4 76 rising sharply, USDJPY CMP 53 H4 82 rising fast
Fading: EURUSD CMP 42 H4 momentum 20 dropping, GBPJPY CMP 43 H4 44 fading, EURJPY CMP 44 H4 50 dropping

WATCH
Fed speaker commentary hits USDJPY directly, hawkish tone extends the H4 82 momentum read toward 110 continuation
UK data follow-through prints above forecast, GBPUSD breaks H4 sell signal and flips to buy targeting USDCHF short via 0.77 correlation
WTI Oil sustains above 101.70, USDCAD H4 Buy at 66 momentum fades and setup invalidates, watch CAD recovery in CADJPY

themes.theme: US Dollar strength from inflation data
Trump-Xi summit outcome supports risk sentiment
British Pound resilience from positive UK data
Indian Rupee weakness from foreign outflows
ECB policy uncertainty and euro consolidation

key_observation: USD rallying on hot inflation data and hawkish Fed repricing despite diplomatic progress from Trump-Xi meeting. GBP resilient from beat UK data but JPY weakening against broad dollar strength. Risk sentiment supported by positive geopolitical developments but tempered by China economic concerns.
watch: ECB Lagarde comments, further Trump-Xi summit details, US Retail Sales data, Chinese economic indicators, commodity price direction especially given new tariff environment
